name: Molasses or Honey Doughnuts (Fastnacht Kucka)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk until it is lukewarm, then stir in the flour to form a smooth batter.
2. Add the dissolved yeast mixture and butter. Mix well and let stand overnight.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the beaten eggs and honey with some flour.
4. Gradually add the remaining flour to the egg mixture until you have enough to lightly dust your work surface.
5. Allow the dough to rise fully before shaping it into doughnuts.
6. Let the dough rise again and fry in hot oil or fat.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
